metadata.description: Claude Code plugins and skills by Diffyweb

plugins.name: quick-install
plugins.description: Install Claude Code plugins directly from a GitHub repo in one command. Wraps marketplace add + plugin install into a single step.

plugins.name: session-search
plugins.description: Search, list, and summarize past Claude Code sessions with BM25 ranked retrieval. Includes 1 slash command (/search-sessions), 1 auto-triggered skill, and a Python CLI.
